prompt: Create a vibrant contemporary Atomic Age pop-art fashion illustration on a clean white background, mixing black-and-white retro photography with neon vector graphics and halftone printing. Center a floating mid-century space-age woman, a slim young woman with pale grayscale skin, glossy black bobbed hair, and a small black pillbox hat, posed diagonally as if dancing in zero gravity with one arm raised and the other extended. Her face is intentionally covered by a soft-edged dark gray square blur. Dress her in a short white 1960s mod mini dress with bold black trim, a vertical black stripe down the front, black sleeve cuffs, black hem, white knee-high go-go boots, and small black heels. Surround her with an energetic atomic-age space collage in hot magenta, cyan turquoise, lime yellow, orange, black, and white: exactly 1 lime rocket with magenta fins and orange exhaust on the left, exactly 2 flying saucers including a large lime-and-black saucer at lower right with a pink dome and a smaller pink saucer near the bottom center, exactly 1 black atomic orbit diagram with a magenta nucleus at mid-right, exactly 4 large foreground antenna-orb spheres in cyan, magenta, lime, and orange near the bottom and left edges, plus many black dots, tiny planets, orbital lines, and needle-like starbursts. Use oversized Ben-Day halftone circles and radial dot fields, especially a huge hot-pink burst in the upper right, cyan dot clouds on the left, and orange-pink gradients at the lower right. Add crisp black radiating lines, retro Sputnik shapes, small colored balls, and thin orbital curves for a playful 1950s sci-fi poster feel updated with glossy modern contrast. Composition should be portrait-oriented, dynamic, high-energy, sharp, clean, graphic, fashion editorial meets vintage space race poster. Include a small handwritten signature and date in the lower right reading May 10, 2026 and Oyagi.
